'''rapunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:waaz|waaz]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-p-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waaz|waaz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rapunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræpinith|ræpinith]] || [[word:ræpinij|ræpinij]] || [[word:ræpinish|ræpinish]] || [[word:ræpini|ræpini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rapupunuth|rapupunuth]] || [[word:rapupunuj|rapupunuj]] || [[word:rapupunush|rapupunush]] || [[word:rapupunu|rapupunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rapunuth|rapunuth]] || [[word:rapunuj|rapunuj]] || [[word:rapunush|rapunush]] || [[word:rapunu|rapunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rapufnuth|rapufnuth]] || [[word:rapufnuj|rapufnuj]] || [[word:rapufnush|rapufnush]] || [[word:rapufnuf|rapufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rapunuthu|rapunuthu]] || [[word:rapunuju|rapunuju]] || [[word:rapunushu|rapunushu]] || [[word:rapunuku|rapunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rapunuth|rapunuth]] || [[word:rapunuj|rapunuj]] || [[word:rapunush|rapunush]] || [[word:rapunu|rapunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rapunuthul|rapunuthul]] || [[word:rapunujul|rapunujul]] || [[word:rapunushul|rapunushul]] || [[word:rapunukul|rapunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rapunuthuthu|rapunuthuthu]] || [[word:rapunujuju|rapunujuju]] || [[word:rapunushushu|rapunushushu]] || [[word:rapunuku|rapunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rapunuthun|rapunuthun]] || [[word:rapunujun|rapunujun]] || [[word:rapunushun|rapunushun]] || [[word:rapunukun|rapunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rapunuthuoro|rapunuthuoro]] || [[word:rapunujuoro|rapunujuoro]] || [[word:rapunushuoro|rapunushuoro]] || [[word:rapunukuoro|rapunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
